publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Office of Commencement Events Cornell University

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: The Cornell University Commencement planning records chronicle the operations of the Office of Commencement Events spanning the years 1974 to 2023. These records encompass a variety of materials, including working files, such as memoranda containing instructions for faculty Marshals and volunteer Ushers, seating charts for the ceremonies, correspondence, invitations, financial-related documents, photographs, and planning books, programs from various years, and regalia, such as graduation caps with tassels in various colors.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Cornell University Commencement planning records, #11-5-1565. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Series I. Working files by year

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Included also finances, photographs and planning books.

did.unittitle: April packet, candidate count, register list
Baccalaureate, baton and bus information, catalogs
File index, invitations, Ithaca College information, Glee club and more
Caps and gown, faculty regalia, brochure, packet to co-chairman, form and program
Mailing packet, letter head and letters
Mobility impaired info and forms, publicity, letters, maps, meetings and more
Severe weather plan, tickets and timetables
Usher information and letters, veterinary exercises
Announcement information, about baccalaureate, bursar and billings, letters
Candidate count, class Marshall and schedule card
Dean's council, trustee information, and meetings
Debriefing information, changes, comments, policies and more
Information on receptions, and thank you letters
Timetables, tickets, sample of brochure, word processing index
Brochures, mailing labels, media facilities and accommodation
Program sample of January packet, president's reception
Committee meetings, debriefing, January packet, labels
Maps, media, correspondence, mobility impaired and program
Regalia, reference documents, registers, sound system
1991. Student communications and mailing projects. green thumb

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Field setup, cap and gown distribution, president breakfast on arts quad.
